ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Petite, Regular, Tall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the clothing type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "old_waist" TEXT /* Old value of the waist measurement */,
  "old_hip" TEXT /* Old value of the hip measurement */,
  "old_thigh" TEXT /* Old value of the thigh measurement */,
  "old_inseam" TEXT /* Old value of the inseam measurement */,
  "old_chest" TEXT /* Old value of the chest measurement */,
  "old_shoulder" TEXT /* Old value of the shoulder measurement */,
  "old_sleeve_length" TEXT /* Old value of the sleeve length measurement */,
  "old_shoulder_to_waist" TEXT /* Old value of the shoulder to waist measurement */,
  "old_hip_to_floor" TEXT /* Old value of the hip to floor measurement */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, quality control specialist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
